title: Ancient Style Peach Blossom Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: 9:16 vertical high-detail ancient Chinese xianxia refined portrait of an adult East Asian woman, 26, with a soft oval face, clear calm eyes, luminous realistic skin, and a gentle confident expression. Tang-fantasy aesthetic, pearl-pink and pale-gold layered gauze dress with translucent sleeves, delicate floral embroidery, pearl tassel hair ornaments, pale-gold hair crown, and refined jewelry. Half-body composition, slight side turn, one hand lightly touching a silk shawl, elegant relaxed shoulders. costume: pearl-pink and pale-gold layered Tang-fantasy gauze dress, pearl tassel hair ornaments. pose: half-body, slight side turn, one hand lightly touching a silk shawl. scene: blurred ancient garden corridor with peach blossoms and warm sunset bokeh. adult finish: high-end xianxia beauty poster, fine embroidery, luminous skin, soft hair detail. subject: adult East Asian woman, 26, soft oval face, clear calm eyes, gentle confident expression.
